description_long: This apartment building complex consists of six tall, rectangular towers arranged in two parallel rows on a shared rectangular base. The towers are finished in alternating shades of brown and beige, with each facade featuring regularly spaced balconies and large windows, creating a rhythmic and symmetrical appearance. The balconies are prominent, projecting outward and bordered by white railings, while the windows are vertically aligned in neat columns. The ground level is set back, forming a wide open plaza or courtyard between the two rows of towers. The roofs are flat, with some minor rooftop structures visible. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, emphasizing function and density for urban residential living.
description: A modern, six-tower apartment complex with alternating brown and beige facades, featuring prominent balconies and large, regularly spaced windows on a shared rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six towers, their balconies, and the open courtyard between the two rows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the towers and the alignment of balconies and windows along the building's length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat backs of the towers with minimal detailing and the open space between the rows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the vertical alignment of balconies and windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in vertical columns, evenly spaced and aligned with the balconies, creating a symmetrical and repetitive pattern across all facades.
